root.name: Research Progress Bar
root.description:
Adds a progress bar to the Garage that shows the selected vehicle's progression at a glance: tech-tree research, Field Modifications, the Elite Levels (prestige) grades and tier-XI reward track, and tier-XI vehicle skill-tree upgrades. Real in-game icons and hover tooltips. Updates live when you switch vehicles or your XP changes.
REQUIRES OpenWG Gameface (install it first) — without it the bar will not appear.
Author: drizzer14
